tlc.details: Model checking completed. No error has been found. | 15 states generated, 12 distinct states found, 0 states left on queue.

validator.output: All 11 panels pass dimensions, palette discipline, Maya presence, and SVG tag balance.

human_review.scope: Visual quality of comic panels (UNVERIFIABLE:OUT_OF_SCOPE - mechanical verification cannot speak to expressive quality)
human_review.by: za (project owner) — to be reviewed by Maya's eye against v1 quality bar
human_review.process: For each of the 11 panels, the reviewer: (a) opens the SVG and the matching Aesthetic Invariants in refinement.md, (b) confirms the declared emotional_beat is visible in Maya's face/posture, (c) confirms the declared background carries the meaning, (d) confirms continuity with the previous panel (lighting, pose, focus). The reviewer signs below or notes which panels need rework.
human_review.trigger: before-merge to main; before-release of any v3-as-primary-narrative update
human_review.re_verification: If a panel is reworked, run bin/verify (model unchanged) and validate-panels.sh (structural), then this human_review trigger fires again for the affected panel only.
checklist: panel 01: Maya confident, sun-light blue, hand on keyboard — establishes baseline
panel 02: Maya triumphant, deploy party, hand with coffee raised
panel 03: three users smiling, all green, Maya absent
panel 04: Maya panicked face — eyes wide, mouth open, hands to temples
panel 05: Maya alone, slumped, lamp circle, red glow from screen, empty chair
panel 06: Maya leans toward mentor, tablet glow, purple ambient
panel 07: Maya in profile, two monitors, focused
panel 08: TLC climax — Maya hand-to-mouth reaction, green beam, bug spotlight
panel 09: Maya points at verified diagram, bug in box, satisfaction
panel 10: panoramic — diverse users, constellation, Maya small but present
panel 11: VERIFIED stamp rotated, Maya looking at stamp
